name: python3-gvm
title: python3-gvm
description:
Greenbone Vulnerability Management Python Library (Python 3)
This module gvm contains the Greenbone Vulnerability Management Python API
library. It's a collection of APIs that help with remote controlling a
Greenbone Security Manager (GSM) appliance and its underlying Greenbone
Vulnerability Manager (GVM). The library essentially abstracts accessing the
communication protocols Greenbone Management Protocol (GMP) and Open Scanner
Protocol (OSP).
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-gvm because Greenbone Vulnerability Management Python Library (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-gvm as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-gvm with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-gvm --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
